tags.name: MCP Servers
tags.description: MCP server management and tool discovery

get.description: Retrieve all agents for the authenticated organization

post.description: Create a new agent with specified configuration and tools

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific agent

patch.description: Update an agent's configuration, tools, or settings

delete.description: Permanently remove an agent and all its associated data

post.description: Publish a specific agent revision to make it the active version

get.description: Retrieve the version history of an agent's configuration changes

schema.description: Maximum number of revisions to return
Number of revisions to skip for pagination

get.description: Compare two agent revisions to see configuration differences
Get a list of runs for a specific agent with optional filtering and pagination

schema.description: Maximum number of runs to return
Number of runs to skip for pagination

post.description: Execute an agent with the provided input data and return results

schema.description: Input data that matches the agent's input schema

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific agent run including results
Retrieve the sequence of events that occurred during an agent run

schema.description: Maximum number of events to return
Number of events to skip for pagination

get.description: Retrieve drives for the authenticated organization with pagination

schema.description: Maximum number of drives to return
Number of drives to skip for pagination

post.description: Create a new drive for the authenticated organization

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific drive

delete.description: Permanently remove a drive and its contents

get.description: List files and directories in a drive

schema.description: Path to list items from. Must start with "/" and must not include ".." segments

post.description: Upload a file into a drive path. Max file size 100MB. Content type is preserved as provided.

path.description: Destination path for the uploaded file. Must start with "/" and must not include ".." segments

file.description: File contents (max 100MB). Content type is preserved as provided.

patch.description: Rename or move a drive file

delete.description: Delete a file from a drive
Delete a directory tree within a drive

schema.description: Path to delete (directory tree). Must start with "/" and must not include ".." segments

get.description: Get all MCP servers for the authenticated organization

post.description: Register a new MCP server for use with agents in your organization

409.description: MCP server with this alias already exists

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific MCP server configuration

patch.description: Modify the configuration of an existing MCP server

delete.description: Remove an MCP server registration from your organization

get.description: Get the list of available tools from a configured MCP server
Retrieve the current settings for the authenticated organization

patch.description: Modify the settings for the authenticated organization

get.description: Get masked API keys for the authenticated organization

patch.description: Update API keys for the authenticated organization

get.description: Get the current credit balance in USD for the authenticated organization
Retrieve information about the authenticated user and their organization

serverId.description: ID of the MCP server to use

enabledTools.description: List of tools to enable from the MCP server

modelStackId.description: The model stack to use for the agent

name.description: Optional human-readable name for the agent

description.description: Optional human-readable description for the agent

webhookUrl.description: URL to receive webhook notifications when runs complete

inputSchema.description: JSON schema defining the structure of input data for runs

goalPrompt.description: The main prompt that defines what the agent should accomplish

customPlanningInstructions.description: Optional custom instructions for the planning phase

customToolCallInstructions.description: Optional custom instructions for tool calling

customResultInstructions.description: Optional custom instructions for result formatting

tools.description: List of tools available to the agent

resultType.description: Type of result the agent should produce

resultSchema.description: JSON schema for result validation (required when resultType is 'json')

UpdateAgentRequest.description: All fields are optional for partial updates

modelStackId.description: The model stack used by the agent

webhookUrl.description: Webhook URL for run completion notifications

goalPrompt.description: The main goal prompt for the agent

resultType.description: Type of result the agent produces

resultSchema.description: JSON schema for result validation (only for json result type)

isPublished.description: Whether the agent has a published revision

hasChanges.description: Whether the agent has unpublished changes

agentId.description: Agent ID that executed this run

limit.description: Maximum number of items per page

all.description: Total number of runs across all statuses

agentId.description: ID of the agent that executed this run

input.description: Input data provided for the run

error.description: Error information (only present when status is 'error')

resultType.description: Type of result (null until run completes)

oneOf.description: JSON result data (structure depends on agent's resultSchema)

resultData.description: The result data (null until run completes successfully)

name.description: Human-readable name for the MCP server
Human-readable name for the MCP server
Human-readable name for the MCP server

organizationId.description: Organization ID associated with the transaction

runId.description: Agent run ID if transaction is related to a specific run

eventId.description: Event ID if transaction is related to a specific event

amount.description: Credit amount in USD (negative for spending, positive for top-ups)

additionalData.description: Additional data associated with the transaction (e.g. usage by model)

createdAt.description: When the transaction was created (ISO 8601 format)

limit.description: Maximum number of items per page

total.description: Total credit usage for the specified period

startDate.description: Start date of the usage period (ISO 8601 format)

endDate.description: End date of the usage period (ISO 8601 format)

period.description: The time period for which usage was calculated

limit.description: Maximum number of items per page

useOwnKeys.description: Whether the organization uses their own API keys
Whether the organization should use their own API keys

limit.description: Maximum number of items per page

path.description: New path for the file. Must start with "/" and must not include ".." segments

isOrganizationOwner.description: Whether the user is the organization owner

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Provide either X-API-Key: <key> or Authorization: Bearer <key>

post.description:
This webhook is called when an agent run completes with a result (done or error).
Configure the webhook URL when creating or updating an agent.
